\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4789 introduces Text Temp Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\mathcal{C}_{\\text{temp}} = \\max \\mathcal{I}(X;Y) \\text{ s.t. } \\Delta t > 0 \\land \\text{Causality}\n\\end{equation}
